couldNotLoad: Xogta shixnadda lama soo bandhigi karin
noSupplierDataBody: Ku dar shixnado leh magacyada alaab-qeybiyayaasha, AskBiz-na si toos ah ayuu u dhisi doonaa kaarka dhibcaha alaab-qeybiyahaaga marka gaarsiimuhu yimaadaan.
onAskNoData: Sideen ugu dejiyaa la-socodka alaab-qeybiyaha AskBiz si aan ula socdo waxqabadka gaarsiinta?
headerSubtitle: Gaarsiin waqti-ku-habboon, hakinta kastamka, maalmaha dib-u-dhaca, iyo saameynta maaliyadeed — lagu qiimeeyay alaab-qeybiye kasta oo taariikhda shixnadahaaga.
footerNote: Dhibcaha waxaa laga xisaabiyay {shipments} shixnad oo {suppliers} alaab-qeybiye ah · Si toos ah ayay u cusbooneysiisaa marka gaarsiimuhu yimaadaan
footerNotePlural: Dhibcaha waxaa laga xisaabiyay {shipments} shixnad oo {suppliers} alaab-qeybiye ah · Si toos ah ayay u cusbooneysiisaa marka gaarsiimuhu yimaadaan
footerNoteShipmentSingularSupplierPlural: Dhibcaha waxaa laga xisaabiyay {shipments} shixnad oo {suppliers} alaab-qeybiye ah · Si toos ah ayay u cusbooneysiisaa marka gaarsiimuhu yimaadaan
footerNoteShipmentPluralSupplierSingular: Dhibcaha waxaa laga xisaabiyay {shipments} shixnad oo {suppliers} alaab-qeybiye ah · Si toos ah ayay u cusbooneysiisaa marka gaarsiimuhu yimaadaan
recGradeA: Isku-halleyn aad u wanaagsan. Mudnaanta sii alaab-qeybiyahan dalabyadaada ugu waqti-xasaasisan.
recGradeB: Waxqabad wanaagsan. Dib-u-dhac yar oo celcelis ahaan {avgDelay} maalmood — la soco balse tallaabo looma baahna.
recGradeCCustoms: {customsCount} hakinta kastam baa la ogaaday — dib u eeg shuruudaha dukumeentiga ka hor dalabka xiga.
recGradeCCustomsPlural: {customsCount} hakinta kastam baa la ogaaday — dib u eeg shuruudaha dukumeentiga ka hor dalabka xiga.
recGradeCOnTime: Heerka waqti-ku-habboon ee {onTimeRate}% wuu ka hooseeyaa heerka la aqbali karo. La hadal alaab-qeybiyaha oo dhis kayd badbaado ah 7 maalmood.
recGradeD: Dib-u-dhac weyn oo celcelis ahaan {avgDelay} maalmood. Saameyn maaliyadeed {financialImpact}. Bilow inaad qiimeyso alaab-qeybiye kale.
recGradeF: Guuldarro isku-halleyn oo halis ah. {delayedCount} ka mid ah {shipmentCount} shixnad ayaa dib u dhacay. Si degdeg ah u kala duw — alaab-qeybiyahan wuxuu kharash ku hayaa ganacsigaaga.
onAskAnalyse: Falanqee waxqabadka gaarsiinta ee {supplierName}. Waxay leeyihiin heer waqti-ku-habboon {onTimeRate}%, celceliska dib-u-dhaca {avgDelay} maalmood, {customsHolds} hakinta kastam, waxayna igu qaateen {sym}{financialImpact} saameyn maaliyadeed. Ma helaa alaab-qeybiye kale?
onAskAlternative: Waxaan u baahanahay inaan helo alaab-qeybiye ku beddela {supplierName} kaas oo ku shixnadaya {carrier}. Maxaan ka raadiyaa alaab-qeybiye beddel ah, sideen u qiimeeyaa?
